title: Piper subglabrilimbum
taxonomy: Piper subglabrilimbum is a species of plant in the family Piperaceae. It belongs to the genus Piper, which is a large group of flowering plants commonly known as pepper plants. Piper subglabrilimbum is a type of vine that is native to the tropical regions of Asia. The classification of Piper subglabrilimbum places it within the order Piperales, a group of flowering plants that are closely related to the laurels and cinnamon family. The plant's classification reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the family Piperaceae.

This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which may help alleviate conditions such as arthritis, wounds, and oxidative stress.
